# PII learning fixture — synthesized email

This fixture contains a synthesized email address that matches the
canonical PII regex (`test@example.com` — `@example.com` is the
RFC-2606-reserved example domain, NOT a real address). The GDPR shell
pre-pass MUST exclude this file from the clustering corpus.
